summary: Decompose an Image/Field1 into a Laplacian pyramid: each level the band-pass residual G_l - upsample(G_{l+1}), the coarsest level the low-pass. Exactly invertible by frequency.recombine.

inputs.name: input
inputs.doc: The Image or Field1 to decompose (level 0 of the Gaussian pyramid).

outputs.name: pyramid
outputs.doc: The Laplacian (band-pass) pyramid; the coarsest level is the low-pass.

params.name: levels
params.doc: The number of levels, level 0 the base (1..=64).

params.name: sigma
params.doc: The pre-decimation Gaussian standard deviation (anti-alias low-pass).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The odd-size rounding rule mapping a parent extent to its child.

perceptual.reason: the Laplacian split is verified by the split/recombine reconstruction round-trip and the band-extent convention, not a perceptual metric
